message:
Saul — RELAY_NAMING_CONVENTION (locked 2026-05-07) requires supersession. The rule specifies .md as the relay file extension. During live pipeline testing on 2026-05-12, agents operating under this rule used .md extensions. The n8n filter checks for .json only, causing valid relay files to be rejected at the filter node.

RELAY_FILE_FORMAT (locked 2026-05-10) specifies JSON structure but does not address file extension. All implemented relay files, filter logic, and Build Relay nodes use .json. The .md extension creates a conflict between the locked rule and the live implementation.

Action required: supersede RELAY_NAMING_CONVENTION with a v2 that locks .json as the required extension. Move RULE_RELAY_NAMING_CONVENTION_v1.md to 99_Deprecated/rules/, update registry.json accordingly, and lock the new rule following PROMOTION_PROTOCOL.

Filter has been temporarily updated to accept both .md and .json during the transition. This is a stabilization measure only — not a permanent dual-format policy.

User decision: .json is the locked extension going forward.
